title: Deena (disambiguation)
content:
'''Deena''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Deena]]''', an employee of [[De'Rruyet Industries]]
*'''[[Deena Lorn]]''', a former [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[stormtrooper]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Deena Behar]]''', a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Aide/Legends|aide]]
*'''[[Deena Kinnet]]''', a [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]]
*'''[[Deena Mipps]]''', a [[Journalist/Legends|journalist]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] spy
*'''[[Deena Riss]]''', a [[Republic Strategic Information Service]] agent
*'''[[Deena Shan]]''', a Rebel [[Private/Legends|private]]
*'''[[Blandos Deena]]''', a member of the [[Intarsa League]]
